subcodes.title: Tawbat-namih
subcodes.first_line: May my life be thy sacrifice! Praise be to God such as He deserves and merits
subcodes.first_line_orig: فداک روحی. الحمد لله کما هو اهله و مستحقه که ظهورات فضل و رحمت خود را در هر حال بر کافۀ عباد خود شامل گردانیده
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @petitions to authorities
